tags.description:
Pick up, drop off point is located within the basement car park.
Taxi, PHV, private vehicles are welcome to use this for passenger pick up or drop off.
Subject to 10-minute grace period.
OG Albert Complex, 60 Albert Street, Singapore 189969.
